line_map.line: Th-th-thin! Th-th-moth! Thin as a moth! (hush… hush…)
Th-th-bath! Th-th-path! Splish in the bath! (splash!)
The moth is in the bath! (hook, repeats)
This moth! That moth! Thin moth in the bath!
Then… up! Up! The moth is on the path.
